blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,779 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
